description: JFK Terminal 4 — major international hub with a wide range of dining.

vendors.name: Shake Shack
vendors.opinion: Best burger in T4, hands down. The ShackBurger is worth every second of that walk.

vendors.name: Panda Express
vendors.opinion: Solid and reliable. The orange chicken hits different when you're in a rush.

vendors.name: Blue Ribbon Sushi
vendors.opinion: Excellent sushi for an airport, but you'll need to eat fast. Worth it if you're craving it.

vendors.name: Tigin Irish Pub
vendors.opinion: Great fish and chips, but it's a hike. With only 40 min, I'd skip it this time.

tips: Skip the pizza at B14 — walk the extra two minutes to Shake Shack. Terminal 4 has the best food options at JFK.
